name: Telepathy

heightened.text: You can communicate telepathically with creatures using shared mental imagery even if you don't share a language; *telepathy* loses the linguistic trait.

text: You can communicate telepathically with creatures within 30 feet. Once you establish a connection by communicating with a creature, the communication is two-way. You can communicate with only creatures that share a language with you.
